209809.clean_title: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED
209809.official_title: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED
title_aliases: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED - In-Person
AHA Heartsaver® First Aid CPR AED - In-Person
209809.seo_title_base: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Class
209809.short_description: Practical first aid, CPR, and AED training with updated emergency recognition topics.
209809.what_to_expect: Hands-on practice plus practical recognition topics such as choking, opioid emergencies and naloxone access, FAST stroke recognition, seizures, asthma inhaler assistance with spacer preference, severe heat illness cooling, safe rewarming, burns, eye injuries, ticks, stings, poison ivy/oak, and pulse oximetry limitations.

445670.official_title: HSI BLS and Adult First Aid | Blended Learning
title_aliases: HSI BLS and Adult First Aid
HSI BLS and Adult First Aid | Blended Learning
445670.seo_title_base: HSI BLS and Adult First Aid | Blended Learning Class
445670.short_description: Blended learning for students who need both HSI BLS and Adult First Aid/CPR/AED. Complete the online portion first, then attend a short in-person skills session.
445670.who_for: Workplaces, medical or dental offices, ABA providers, and organizations that need both BLS and First Aid coverage in one HSI program.
445670.long_description:
HSI BLS and Adult First Aid – Blended Learning

This blended learning course combines HSI Basic Life Support (BLS) and Adult First Aid/CPR/AED into one certification. Students complete the online coursework first, then attend a brief in-person skills session with an authorized HSI instructor.

Step 1: Complete the assigned online course.
Step 2: Attend a 30–60 minute in-person skills session.

This course is often a strong fit for workplaces, medical or dental offices, ABA providers, and other organizations that need both BLS and First Aid coverage in one program.

Certification: HSI certification issued upon successful completion and valid for two years.

Important: The online portion must be completed before your in-person skills session. The blended course link is non-refundable once issued.

HSI® is a registered trademark of Health & Safety Institute. 910CPR is an authorized provider offering blended learning and in-person HSI courses.
445670.who_class_for: Students and employees who need both HSI BLS and Adult First Aid/CPR/AED certification.
445670.prerequisites: Complete the assigned online course before the in-person skills session.
445670.what_to_expect: Complete the HSI online coursework first, then attend a short hands-on skills session with an authorized HSI instructor.
445670.certification_card: HSI certification issued upon successful completion and valid for two years.
445670.renewal_info: Certification is valid for two years.
